subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam-Husayn! Most beloved is thy name. God willing, mayest thou act in accordance with that which befitteth this blessed name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلامحسین اسمت بسیار محبوبست انشاء الله بانچه سزاوار این اسم مبارکست عمل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @personal instructions, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
